summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Pesto Restaurant Web App (Jolly's Kafe). All major features are working correctly with mock data. The app successfully loads all pages, handles navigation, location switching, category filtering, and cart functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Home link not easily accessible from menu catalog page - navigation back to home requires direct URL or browser back button

design_issues.issue: Minor SVG path rendering errors in console for some icons

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero section and navigation
Menu catalog displays with proper header and content
Category filtering works (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, All Items)
Location selector changes menu items per location (5 locations tested)
Add to cart functionality works correctly
Shopping cart page loads with items and order summary
Table reservation page loads with location selection
Login page loads with proper form fields
Register page loads with account creation form
Multiple add to cart actions work
Location switching updates menu items correctly
